slamfitness.name: Slam Fitness
slamfitness.tagline: Every rep remembered. Every milestone earned.

activities.name: Session Check-In
activities.description: Attend any scheduled session at Slam — show up, earn Iron.

activities.name: Off-Peak Power Hour
activities.description: Attend a weekday session between 10am–3pm to unlock bonus Iron and ease the quiet-day problem.

activities.name: PR Logged
activities.description: Log a verified personal record in any tracked lift — deadlift, squat, bench, or overhead press.

activities.name: Format Explorer
activities.description: Attend three different class formats within a single calendar month to earn bonus Iron.

activities.name: Coach Challenge Complete
activities.description: Complete the monthly challenge set by your named coach — personalised, time-bound, and coach-verified.

activities.name: 7-Day Streak
activities.description: Attend at least one session every 7 consecutive days — logged automatically on day 7.

activities.name: 30-Day Streak
activities.description: Maintain consistent sessions across 30 consecutive days — a milestone of commitment, not a grind.

activities.name: Welcome Back
activities.description: Attend your first session after an absence of 7 or more days — re-entry is celebrated, not penalised.

activities.name: Referral Registered
activities.description: A friend you referred joins Slam and completes their first paid session.

activities.name: Referral Locked In
activities.description: Your referred friend completes their first full month as a paying member.

activities.name: Community Post
activities.description: Tag Slam in an Instagram or social media post — verified via opt-in confirmation in the app.

activities.name: Advance Booker
activities.description: Book your next session within 24 hours of completing a session — building the habit that predicts retention.

activities.name: 90-Day Milestone
activities.description: Reach 90 days of active membership with at least two sessions per week sustained — a genuine commitment marker.

rewards.name: Guest Day Pass
rewards.description: Bring a friend for a free single session — your best recruitment tool, rewarded.

rewards.name: Priority Class Booking
rewards.description: Unlock a 24-hour early access window to book the following week's most popular sessions before anyone else.

rewards.name: Iron Shaker
rewards.description: Receive a Slam-branded shaker bottle — a physical artefact of belonging, earned not bought.

rewards.name: Free Session Credit
rewards.description: Redeem one free drop-in session to use anytime or gift to a friend.

rewards.name: One-to-One Assessment
rewards.description: Enjoy a private 30-minute strength assessment and goal-setting session with a named coach.

rewards.name: Month Loyalty Discount
rewards.description: Receive 20% off your next monthly membership renewal — tangible financial recognition for sustained loyalty.

rewards.name: Coach Programme Design
rewards.description: Receive a bespoke 4-week training plan built by your coach specifically for your current goals.

rewards.name: Iron Circle Founding Badge
rewards.description: Earn a permanent profile badge and wall recognition at the studio — you helped build this community.
